summary: Unpinned actions (checkout@v4 should use full SHA commit) violate best practices. Bash scripts follow conventions well (set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, glob handling). Workflow structure sound but integration tests brittle—depend on exact output format. Hardcoded actionlint version (1.7.12) risks version drift. Minor duplication in integration test assertions (lines 37–51). run-tests.sh harness well-designed for act CI isolation. No fatal flaws but maintainability concerns from version hardcoding and output brittleness.
